chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1163 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 23.12.2025 Mr. Allah Dino Kubar, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicants submits statement along with order dated 15.12.2025, whereby three bail applications were allowed, and the applicants therein were granted bail in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each in the same crime as present in the matter. Learned DPG, on account of the above referred order passed in Criminal Bail Applications No. S-968, 969 & 970 of 2025, does not oppose the bail. Accordingly, similar treatment available to the present applicants, bail application stands allowed. The order dated 05.12.2025, whereby the applicants were granted interim pre-arrest bail, is confirmed; however, the surety amount is extended from Rs.25,000/- each to Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) each. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
